name: Valrhona Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 5 1/2 ounces imported bittersweet chocolate, coarsely chopped
11 tablespoons unsalted butter, cut into large pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Butter and flour six 6-ounce custard cups.
3. Place the chocolate and butter in a metal bowl and set it over a pan of simmering water. Stir until melted and smooth. Cool slightly.
4. Using an electric mixer, beat the eggs, yolks, and sugar together until pale and thick, about 10 minutes. Reduce speed and gradually mix in the flour.
5. Add the chocolate mixture to the flour mixture and continue to beat until thick and glossy, about 5 minutes.
6. Divide the batter among the prepared cups. Add a tablespoon of chopped chocolate on top.
7. Bake until the cake is set around the edges but the center moves slightly when the cup is lifted, about 12 minutes. Cool slightly.
8. Run a sharp knife around the edges of the cups. Turn out onto plates and serve with warm ice cream.
6 servings.
